summary: Re-tested backend after slimming requirements.txt. Backend supervisor status RUNNING; all 4 pytest cases pass (GET /api/, POST /api/contact valid persist+GET verify, POST invalid email -> 422, POST missing fields -> 422). email_sent=false as expected (RESEND_API_KEY empty). Slimmed deps (fastapi, uvicorn, motor, pymongo, dnspython, pydantic, python-dotenv, email-validator, resend) are sufficient — no ImportError, EmailStr still works (email-validator present).
critical_code_review_comments: requirements.txt has no version pin for uvicorn extras (standard) — fine for Render but consider uvicorn[standard] if websockets/http-tools needed.
seed_data_creation: Added 1 TEST_ contact message via API during pytest run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend confirmed working with slimmed requirements.txt. Render deploy itself not testable from this env. RESEND_API_KEY intentionally empty -> email_sent=false expected.
